# Market Sizing — Korea Fintech

## Summary

The total addressable market for Korea fintech in 2026 is estimated at USD 18.3 billion.
This number anchors downstream revenue modeling for the go-to-market workstream.

## Competitor Landscape

Competitors include Toss, Kakao Pay, Naver Pay, and smaller regional issuers.
Market share concentrates among the top three; tail providers occupy niche verticals.

## Segmentation

We segment the market into retail payments, B2B settlement rails, and data-broker adjacencies.
Each segment has distinct go-to-market motions and pricing reference points.
